support_export_assertions: Every exported run row carries run_id, attempt_id, execution_context_ref, target, boundary, lifecycle, freshness, and old/current relationship tokens.
Every durable job row exposes retry, rerun_exactly, rerun_with_current_context, and open_details action refs.
Every artifact sheet carries producing_run_id, producing_attempt_id, freshness, retention_class, redaction_class, preferred viewer, and raw fallback posture.
Every rerun review sheet exposes both rerun_exactly and rerun_with_current_context before dispatch when drift is present.
The full interruption taxonomy is exported even when a specific support packet only contains a subset of interrupted runs.
